requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Requirements — Space Heaters (EU 2016/2281 via EEA) and Cold-climate SCOP
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计要求——供暖设备（EU 2016/2281，通过欧洲经济区适用）及严寒气候SCOP
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計要求——供暖設備（EU 2016/2281，通過歐洲經濟區適用）及嚴寒氣候SCOP

summary.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (implementing Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC) sets minimum seasonal energy efficiency requirements for air-heating products including heat pumps, and applies in Norway via EEA. For heat pumps, efficiency is expressed via SCOP (seasonal coefficient of performance) tested to EN 14511 at rated conditions and EN 14825 for seasonal performance calculation. Norway's cold climate makes the EN 14825 cold-climate test points at -7°C and -15°C outdoor ambient temperature mandatory benchmarks: a heat pump that cannot sustain rated heating capacity at -15°C is unsuitable for most Norwegian installation sites. Enova subsidy eligibility also requires demonstrated SCOP compliance.
summary.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（实施生态设计指令2009/125/EC）为包括热泵在内的供暖产品设定了最低季节性能效要求，并通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用。对于热泵，效率通过SCOP（季节性性能系数）表示，按EN 14511在额定工况下测试，并按EN 14825计算季节性性能。挪威寒冷气候使EN 14825在室外环境温度-7°C和-15°C下的严寒气候测试点成为强制性基准：无法在-15°C时保持额定制热能力的热泵不适合大多数挪威安装场所。Enova补贴资格同样要求证明符合SCOP要求。
summary.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（實施生態設計指令2009/125/EC）為包括熱泵在內的供暖產品設定了最低季節性能效要求，並通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用。對於熱泵，效率通過SCOP（季節性性能係數）表示，按EN 14511在額定工況下測試，並按EN 14825計算季節性性能。挪威寒冷氣候使EN 14825在室外環境溫度-7°C和-15°C下的嚴寒氣候測試點成為強制性基準：無法在-15°C時保持額定制熱能力的熱泵不適合大多數挪威安裝場所。Enova補貼資格同樣要求證明符合SCOP要求。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (Ecodesign — air-heating products — applicable via EEA)
EN 14825 (seasonal performance calculation including cold-climate test points at -7°C and -15°C)

summary.en: GB 21454-2008 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for multi-connected air conditioning (heat pump) units) and GB 21455-2019 for room air conditioners specify COP at rated conditions. GB/T 25127-2010 series covers low-ambient-temperature heating performance but does not employ the SCOP methodology. No Chinese standard requires EN 14825 cold-climate test points at -7°C and -15°C ambient, nor are seasonal efficiency calculation methods equivalent to EU Ecodesign.
summary.zh: GB 21454-2008（多联式空调（热泵）机组能效限定值及能效等级）和GB 21455-2019（房间空调器）规定了额定工况下的COP。GB/T 25127-2010系列涵盖低环境温度制热性能，但未采用SCOP方法。没有中国标准要求在-7°C和-15°C环境温度下进行EN 14825严寒气候测试，季节性效率计算方法也与欧盟生态设计不等效。
summary.zht: GB 21454-2008（多聯式空調（熱泵）機組能效限定值及能效等級）和GB 21455-2019（房間空調器）規定了額定工況下的COP。GB/T 25127-2010系列涵蓋低環境溫度制熱性能，但未採用SCOP方法。沒有中國標準要求在-7°C和-15°C環境溫度下進行EN 14825嚴寒氣候測試，季節性效率計算方法也與歐盟生態設計不等效。

gap.en: No SCOP methodology equivalent in Chinese standards. Chinese efficiency test data cannot be directly used to demonstrate compliance with Ecodesign seasonal efficiency thresholds as required in Norway via EEA. Full re-testing to EN 14511 and seasonal performance calculation to EN 14825 — including cold-climate test points at -7°C and -15°C — is required. Heat pumps without validated cold-climate performance data are unsuitable for the Norwegian market regardless of Ecodesign status.
gap.zh: 中国标准中没有等效的SCOP方法。中国效率测试数据不能直接用于证明符合挪威通过欧洲经济区要求的生态设计季节性效率门槛。需按EN 14511重新进行全面测试，并按EN 14825（含-7°C和-15°C严寒气候测试点）计算季节性性能。无论生态设计合规状态如何，缺少严寒气候性能验证数据的热泵均不适合挪威市场。
gap.zht: 中國標準中沒有等效的SCOP方法。中國效率測試數據不能直接用於證明符合挪威通過歐洲經濟區要求的生態設計季節性效率門檻。需按EN 14511重新進行全面測試，並按EN 14825（含-7°C和-15°C嚴寒氣候測試點）計算季節性性能。無論生態設計合規狀態如何，缺少嚴寒氣候性能驗證數據的熱泵均不適合挪威市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (Ecodesign via EEA — Norwegian market access prohibited for non-compliant products; Enova subsidies also require SCOP compliance)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — no SCOP equivalent in Chinese standards; re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 required including cold-climate tests at -7°C and -15°C; cold-climate performance is a Norway-specific commercial imperative beyond the regulatory minimum.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国标准中无等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825（含-7°C和-15°C严寒气候测试）重新测试；严寒气候性能是超越法规最低要求的挪威市场商业必要条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國標準中無等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825（含-7°C和-15°C嚴寒氣候測試）重新測試；嚴寒氣候性能是超越法規最低要求的挪威市場商業必要條件。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Heat Pumps (Regulation (EU) No 811/2013 via EEA) and Enova Subsidy Criteria
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——热泵（欧盟法规第811/2013号，通过欧洲经济区适用）及Enova补贴标准
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——熱泵（歐盟法規第811/2013號，通過歐洲經濟區適用）及Enova補貼標準

summary.en: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 811/2013 (delegated act under Regulation 2017/1369) applies in Norway via EEA. It requires an A+++ to G energy efficiency scale for space heaters. Heat pumps must display a seasonal efficiency class on a mandatory EU/EEA energy label. Enova SF, the Norwegian state enterprise for energy efficiency, provides subsidies for eligible heat pumps; current Enova programme conditions typically require demonstrated minimum SCOP compliance (verified via EU energy label data) and CE marking. Enova conditions should be verified at enova.no before purchase.
summary.zh: 能效标签法规（EU）811/2013（依据法规2017/1369的授权法案）通过欧洲经济区在挪威适用。它要求空间供暖设备采用A+++至G能效等级。热泵须在产品上粘贴强制性欧盟/欧洲经济区能效标签，显示季节性效率等级。挪威负责能源效率的国家企业Enova SF为符合条件的热泵提供补贴；当前Enova计划条件通常要求证明符合最低SCOP要求（通过欧盟能效标签数据验证）并取得CE标志。采购前应在enova.no核实Enova条件。
summary.zht: 能效標籤法規（EU）811/2013（依據法規2017/1369的授權法案）通過歐洲經濟區在挪威適用。它要求空間供暖設備採用A+++至G能效等級。熱泵須在產品上粘貼強制性歐盟/歐洲經濟區能效標籤，顯示季節性效率等級。挪威負責能源效率的國家企業Enova SF為符合條件的熱泵提供補貼；當前Enova計畫條件通常要求證明符合最低SCOP要求（通過歐盟能效標籤數據驗證）並取得CE標誌。採購前應在enova.no核實Enova條件。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 811/2013 (energy labelling — space heaters — applicable via EEA)

summary.en: China's energy efficiency labelling is governed by the GB 12021 series and the MIIT/SAMR energy label scheme. The Chinese label format, efficiency tier definitions, and rating methodology differ from the EU/EEA energy label. Chinese energy labels are not recognised in the Norwegian market and cannot substitute the required EU/EEA label.
summary.zh: 中国能效标签由GB 12021系列及工信部/市监总局能效标识制度管理。中国标签格式、效率等级定义及评级方法与欧盟/欧洲经济区能效标签不同。中国能效标识在挪威市场不被认可，不能替代欧盟/欧洲经济区要求的标签。
summary.zht: 中國能效標籤由GB 12021系列及工信部/市監總局能效標識制度管理。中國標籤格式、效率等級定義及評級方法與歐盟/歐洲經濟區能效標籤不同。中國能效標識在挪威市場不被認可，不能替代歐盟/歐洲經濟區要求的標籤。

gap.en: A new EU/EEA energy label complying with Regulation (EU) 811/2013 is required for the Norwegian market. Seasonal efficiency must be re-calculated using EN 14825 methodology (including cold-climate test points). Chinese energy label data cannot be directly transposed. Absence of a compliant EU energy label also blocks access to Enova subsidies, which are commercially significant in the Norwegian market.
gap.zh: 挪威市场需要符合欧盟法规811/2013的新欧盟/欧洲经济区能效标签。季节性效率须按EN 14825方法（含严寒气候测试点）重新计算。中国能效标签数据不能直接转换使用。缺少合规的欧盟能效标签还将阻碍获取Enova补贴，而补贴在挪威市场具有重要商业价值。
gap.zht: 挪威市場需要符合歐盟法規811/2013的新歐盟/歐洲經濟區能效標籤。季節性效率須按EN 14825方法（含嚴寒氣候測試點）重新計算。中國能效標籤數據不能直接轉換使用。缺少合規的歐盟能效標籤還將阻礙獲取Enova補貼，而補貼在挪威市場具有重要商業價值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU/EEA energy label required before market placement; Enova subsidies additionally require SCOP compliance evidence)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese energy label under GB 12021 series)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — new EU/EEA energy label required; Chinese label not accepted; seasonal efficiency must be recalculated to EN 14825 including cold-climate test points; non-compliance also blocks Enova subsidy access in Norway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要新的欧盟/欧洲经济区能效标签；中国标签不被接受；季节性效率须按EN 14825（含严寒气候测试点）重新计算；不合规还将阻碍在挪威获取Enova补贴。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要新的歐盟/歐洲經濟區能效標籤；中國標籤不被接受；季節性效率須按EN 14825（含嚴寒氣候測試點）重新計算；不合規還將阻礙在挪威獲取Enova補貼。
